title: Jamaican Cherry Crumble
description: A gluten-free dessert that combines the sweetness of cherries with the spices of Jamaica, topped with a crumbly oat topping.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together cherries, Jamaican Jerk Spice, and sugar. Let it sit for 15 minutes.
Roll out the flaky pastry crust and place it in a 9-inch pie dish.
Fill the pastry crust with the cherry mixture and spread it evenly.
Mix together almond flour, melted butter, and chopped fresh cherries (if using).
Spread the crumble topping evenly over the cherry filling.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
Let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
